headline: Dow Wavers. It's Getting Hit by Tech Now, Too.
summary: Now even the Dow is getting hit by technology stock selling. The blue-chip index was struggling to stay above breakeven even though a majority of its stocks were trading higher. Salesforce, International Business Machines, Microsoft, Amazon.

headline: Can IBM's AI Innovation for the Masters Tournament Benefit Its Shares?
summary: IBM unveils AI-powered Vault Search and enhanced Hole Insights, transforming how fans explore Masters history and track every shot in real time.

headline: Tradr Launches Leveraged ETFs on AMZN, AAOI, HL and IBM
summary: Tradr ETFs, a provider of ETFs designed for sophisticated investors and professional traders, today launched four new leveraged ETFs on single stocks. The Cboe-listed funds seek to deliver either two times the inverse (-200%) or two times long (200%) the daily performance of a specific underlying stock. All four ETFs are first-to-market strategies.

headline: BofA Reaffirms Buy on IBM Stock Amid Agentic AI Expansion
summary: International Business Machines Corporation (NYSE:IBM) ranks among the best most active stocks to buy right now. headline: Masters AI Experience Launch Could Be A Game Changer For International Business Machines (IBM)
summary: Earlier in March 2026, IBM and the Masters Tournament expanded their 30-year collaboration by rolling out new watsonx AI-powered fan experiences, including an interactive Masters Vault video archive and enhanced real-time Hole Insights across Masters digital platforms. These features showcase IBM’s Granite small language models and agentic watsonx Orchestrate tools in a high-visibility sports setting, turning decades of golf data and video into conversational, personalized insights for...
